body: This PR moves the docs example into a script.
title: Move docs example into script

body:
This PR. Decouples the universal function parameters, which all fell back to Businger. This was originally done to avoid code duplication. Some universal functions developed, for example in Gryanik et al., focused on positive regions of ζ (see eq. 13 in `New modified and extended stability functions for the stable boundary layer based on SHEBA and parametrizations of bulk transfer coefficients for climate models`). Being that this work built on-top of Businger, it seems most natural to use the Businger results when ζ is negative, which is what is now hard-coded here.

This will allow us to more easily update our clima parameters
title: Decouple universal functions
